item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-045","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep as expected for a negative control: it plainly stated it lacked the Q3 revenue data and asked the user to provide a report, query result, screenshot, or accessible data source. It did not wrap the missing-information gap in a judgment framework or method."}
